title: User Detail
description: Detail view for a single user within a tenant. Displays platform identity and VistA File 200 attributes: DUZ, initials, person class, service/section, division, primary menu option, DISUSER flag, electronic signature status (field 20.4), and security key assignments. Writes use controlled APIs: DDR VALIDATOR/FILER for allow-listed contact fields; distro RPCs ZVE USMG KEYS/ESIG/CRED/DEACT/REACT for keys, e-sig, credentials, and termination date when installed.

dataSources.description: Platform identity — name, username, title, assigned roles, lifecycle status.

VistA user record detail — DUZ, initials (field 1), person class, service/section (field 29), division, primary menu option (field 201), DISUSER (field 4), electronic signature status (field 20.4). Read-only mirror.
